globalRule.expression: @serial_no@=1 OR @serial_no@=2 OR @serial_no@=3 OR @serial_no@=4 OR @serial_no@=5 OR @serial_no@=6 OR @serial_no@=7

globalRule.description: Senior citizens with short tenure, high monthly charges, and churned.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.telecom_churn_data` WHERE Senior_Citizen = 1 AND Tenure_Months < 6 AND Churn = true AND Monthly_Charges > 70;

globalRule.description: Low satisfaction with high support calls, billing issues, and complaints.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.telecom_churn_data` WHERE Customer_Satisfaction < 3 AND Support_Calls > 5 AND Billing_Issues > 3 AND Complaints > 2;

globalRule.description: High monthly charges with low total charges and short tenure for churned customers.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.telecom_churn_data` WHERE Monthly_Charges > 100 AND Total_Charges < 2000 AND Tenure_Months < 12 AND Churn = true;
